projectDescription: A Next.js internal team tool that randomly assigns weekly meeting facilitators via a roulette wheel, manages the schedule, and sends automated email reminders.
keyFeatures: Animated roulette wheel that randomly assigns a team member to lead the next Friday meeting
Weekly schedule calendar with drag-and-drop date swapping between members
Slide preparation editor with agenda, key points, notes, themes, and fonts
Full-screen presentation mode with interactive checkable agenda items
Manual and automatic (GitHub Actions cron) email notifications via Gmail SMTP
PIN-based access control with JWT cookies (30-day sessions)
AI news feed aggregated from 10 curated RSS sources, refreshed every 3 hours
Assignment change log tracking all schedule swaps
Four presentation themes: Default, Minimal, CoE AI (blueprint), HenryStyle (warm)
publicApiSurface: POST /api/auth — Validate PIN and issue JWT cookie
DELETE /api/auth — Clear the auth cookie (sign out)
POST /api/notify — Send manual email notification for a specific assignment
GET /api/cron/notify — Automated weekly notification (cron, requires x-cron-secret header)
GET /api/cron/refresh-news — Refresh AI news feed from RSS sources (cron, requires x-cron-secret header)
loadData(): Promise<AppData> — Load all members and assignments from Supabase
addMember(name, email?): Promise<TeamMember> — Add a new team member and create their first assignment slot
updateMemberName(id, name): Promise<void> — Rename a member (propagates to assignments and templates)
updateMemberEmail(id, email): Promise<void> — Update a member's notification email
toggleMember(id): Promise<void> — Toggle a member's active status
removeMember(id): Promise<void> — Remove a member, marking future assignments as unassigned
swapAssignmentMembers(idA, idB): Promise<void> — Swap two assignments and log the change
buildBulkAssignmentPreview(): Promise<BulkAssignmentPreview[]> — Generate a randomised assignment preview for all active members
confirmBulkAssignment(previews): Promise<void> — Persist the bulk assignment preview to the database
loadTemplate(assignmentId): Promise<Template | null> — Load the presentation template for an assignment
saveTemplate(template): Promise<void> — Upsert a presentation template
loadLogs(): Promise<{ entries: LogEntry[]; tableError: boolean }> — Load the last 50 swap log entries
getNextFridays(count): string[] — Return the next N upcoming Friday dates
